parameters.query:
-- Verification BEFORE update
-- Shows exactly what WILL be promoted vs blocked
WITH candidates AS (
    SELECT
        r.record_id,
        r.full_name,
        r.email,
        r.normalized_url,
        r.stage,
        r.status,
        -- Check 1: mandatory fields
        CASE
            WHEN r.full_name IS NULL THEN 'missing_name'
            WHEN r.email IS NULL THEN 'missing_email'
            WHEN r.normalized_url IS NULL 
                THEN 'missing_url'
            ELSE 'fields_ok'
        END AS field_check,
        -- Check 2: S4 sibling exists?
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM _learnersRaw s
            WHERE s.normalized_url = r.normalized_url
            AND s.stage = 'S4'
            AND s.record_id != r.record_id
        ) AS has_s4_sibling
    FROM _learnersRaw r
    WHERE r.stage IN ('S1', 'S3', 'S5')
    AND r.stage != 'S7'
)
SELECT
    record_id,
    full_name,
    email,
    normalized_url,
    stage,
    field_check,
    has_s4_sibling,
    CASE
        WHEN field_check != 'fields_ok' 
            THEN 'BLOCKED_FIELDS'
        WHEN has_s4_sibling = TRUE 
            THEN 'BLOCKED_S4'
        ELSE 'WILL_PROMOTE'
    END AS promotion_decision
FROM candidates
ORDER BY stage, promotion_decision;

-- MAIN UPDATE: Promote safe records to S6
-- Constraints enforced in WHERE clause:
-- 1. Only S1, S3, S5 (never touch S7)
-- 2. Must have normalized_url
-- 3. Must have full_name
-- 4. Must have email  
-- 5. Must NOT have S4 sibling

UPDATE _learnersRaw
SET
    stage = 'S6',
    status = 'crm_pending',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE stage IN ('S1', 'S3', 'S5')
AND stage != 'S7'
AND normalized_url IS NOT NULL
AND full_name IS NOT NULL
AND email IS NOT NULL
AND record_id NOT IN (
    -- Exclude any record with S4 sibling
    SELECT DISTINCT r.record_id
    FROM _learnersRaw r
    INNER JOIN _learnersRaw s
        ON s.normalized_url = r.normalized_url
        AND s.stage = 'S4'
        AND s.record_id != r.record_id
    WHERE r.stage IN ('S1', 'S3', 'S5')
)
RETURNING
    record_id,
    full_name,
    email,
    normalized_url,
    stage,
    status,
    updated_at;

-- Count results and write audit log
WITH summary AS (
    -- Pass count (just promoted to S6)
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS pass_count
    FROM _learnersRaw
    WHERE stage = 'S6'
    AND updated_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute'
),
blocked_s4 AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM _learnersRaw r
    WHERE r.stage IN ('S1', 'S3', 'S5')
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM _learnersRaw s
        WHERE s.normalized_url = r.normalized_url
        AND s.stage = 'S4'
        AND s.record_id != r.record_id
    )
),
blocked_fields AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM _learnersRaw
    WHERE stage IN ('S1', 'S3', 'S5')
    AND (full_name IS NULL 
         OR email IS NULL 
         OR normalized_url IS NULL)
)
INSERT INTO crm_pending_log
(run_id, pass_count, block_count,
 blocked_s4_sibling, blocked_missing_fields,
 action, result)
SELECT
    'RUN-' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::BIGINT,
    s.pass_count,
    bs4.cnt + bf.cnt,
    bs4.cnt,
    bf.cnt,
    'crm_pending_promotion',
    'completed'
FROM summary s, blocked_s4 bs4, 
     blocked_fields bf;

-- Verification AFTER update
-- Confirms S6 promotions + shows remaining blocked
SELECT
    stage,
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS record_count,
    STRING_AGG(record_id, ', ' 
        ORDER BY record_id) AS record_ids
FROM _learnersRaw
WHERE stage IN (
    'S1', 'S3', 'S4', 'S5', 'S6', 'S7',
    'S4_ABSORBED', 'S1_BLOCKED', 'S3_BLOCKED'
)
GROUP BY stage, status
ORDER BY stage;

-- Detailed view of what happened
SELECT
    record_id,
    full_name,
    email,
    normalized_url,
    stage,
    status,
    updated_at,
    CASE
        WHEN stage = 'S6' THEN '✅ Promoted'
        WHEN stage = 'S7' THEN '🔒 Protected S7'
        WHEN stage = 'S4' THEN '⏳ In Merge Queue'
        WHEN stage = 'S4_ABSORBED' 
            THEN '🔄 Absorbed by merge'
        WHEN full_name IS NULL 
            OR email IS NULL 
            THEN '❌ Blocked: Missing fields'
        WHEN normalized_url IS NULL 
            THEN '❌ Blocked: No URL'
        ELSE '⚠️ Still pending'
    END AS record_state
FROM _learnersRaw
ORDER BY stage, updated_at DESC;
